violations.text: Inspector observed scoops with handles touching food in the cold hold wells. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. PIC moved handles above food during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - 1 door freezer (inside and outside door/handle) - lowboy - prep table shelves Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025
Inspector observed a large pile of cardboard boxes and bags of trash in the back kitchen area. PIC removed items during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep table shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024

Refuse area observed with an accumulation of litter, foliage, and/or other debris. The outside refuse areas shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024

The floors in walk in cooler and freezer have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves and counters have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2023
The plumbing to the food prep sink is in poor repair. Service has been notified. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2023
